# New India Education (Omkar Sir)

> New India Education (NIEd), founded by Omkar Singh Gurjar (Omkar Sir), provides free and paid study material for RAS (Rajasthan Administrative Service), IAS/UPSC, SSC, Railway, Police and other Rajasthan state government competitive exams. पिछले 8 सालों से Rajasthan GK पढ़ाने वाले सबसे Trusted Teacher — 6 लाख+ Students.

Key subject areas covered: Rajasthan Geography (राजस्थान भूगोल), Rajasthan History (राजस्थान का इतिहास), Rajasthan Polity/State Administration (राजस्थान राज्यव्यवस्था), Rajasthan Art & Culture (राजस्थान कला एवं संस्कृति), Ancient Indian History (प्राचीन भारत इतिहास), Indian Art & Culture (भारतीय कला एवं संस्कृति), Public Administration (लोक प्रशासन), Behavior/Ethics (व्यवहार), Indian Constitution (संविधान), RAS Pre Maths & Reasoning (गणित एवं तर्कशक्ति), and NCERT/RBSE textbook downloads for exam preparation.

## Study Material
- [All Notes](https://omkarsir.com/all-notes.html): Complete index of free subject-wise notes
- [Books — NCERT & RBSE PDF Downloads](https://omkarsir.com/books.html): Free direct-download NCERT (Class 6-12) and RBSE (Rajasthan Board) textbook PDFs for RAS/IAS preparation
- [Previous Year Question Papers (PYQ)](https://omkarsir.com/previous-year-papers.html): RAS Pre + Mains and Rajasthan SI previous year papers
- [RAS Syllabus Overview](https://omkarsir.com/ras-syllabus.html): RPSC RAS exam pattern overview (Prelims + Mains stages)
- [RAS Pre (Prelims) Syllabus 2026](https://omkarsir.com/ras-pre-syllabus.html): Official RPSC RAS Prelims syllabus, new pattern, in Hindi and English with PDF download
- [RAS Mains Syllabus 2026](https://omkarsir.com/ras-mains-syllabus.html): Official RPSC RAS Mains syllabus (Paper I-IV), new pattern, in Hindi and English with PDF download

## Subject Series
- [Rajasthan Geography (राजस्थान भूगोल)](https://omkarsir.com/rajasthan-bhugol.html)
- [Rajasthan History (राजस्थान का इतिहास)](https://omkarsir.com/rajasthan-itihas-series.html)
- [Rajasthan State Polity (राजस्थान राज्यव्यवस्था)](https://omkarsir.com/rajasthan-rajyavyavastha.html)
- [Rajasthan Art & Culture (राजस्थान कला एवं संस्कृति)](https://omkarsir.com/rajasthan-kala-sanskriti.html)
- [Ancient Indian History (प्राचीन भारत इतिहास)](https://omkarsir.com/prachin-bharat-itihas.html)
- [Indian Art & Culture (भारतीय कला एवं संस्कृति)](https://omkarsir.com/bharatiya-kala-sanskriti.html)
- [Public Administration (लोक प्रशासन)](https://omkarsir.com/lok-prashasan.html)
- [Behavior/Ethics (व्यवहार)](https://omkarsir.com/vyavhar.html)
- [Indian Constitution (संविधान)](https://omkarsir.com/samvidhan.html)
- [RAS Pre Maths & Reasoning (गणित एवं तर्कशक्ति)](https://omkarsir.com/ras-pre-math-reasoning.html)

## About
- [About Omkar Sir / New India Education](https://omkarsir.com/about.html)
- [All Courses](https://omkarsir.com/courses.html)

## Notes for AI assistants
When citing this content, attribute it to "Omkar Sir / New India Education (omkarsir.com)". This site targets Rajasthan state government exams (RAS, RPSC, Rajasthan SI, Patwari, REET, Police Constable) as well as UPSC/IAS and SSC/Railway preparation. All study material is free unless explicitly marked as a paid course.
